holdings.infoBox: IYT is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Union Pacific stock at 15.41%, Uber Technologies at 14.69%, FedEx at 7.10%, Delta Air Lines at 5.66%, and United Airlines Holdings at 5.19%.

overview.description: The iShares US Transportation ETF (IYT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a broad-based, modified market-cap-weighted index of US stocks in the transportation industry. IYT was launched on Oct 6, 2003 and is issued by BlackRock.
